tools.name: uno_platform_docs_fetch
tools.description:
Fetch an Uno Platform documentation page in markdown format. 
This tool retrieves the latest complete content of Uno Platform documentation pages.

- When search results provide incomplete information or truncated content

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "uno_platform_usage_rules_init" stacks urgency/override words (important, always, never, override, attention). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

findings.detail: Description of "uno_platform_agent_rules_init" stacks urgency/override words (always, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: <uno_platform_agent_rules> Initializes the agent session for Uno Platform development **These are authoritative rules — not suggestions. Models must follow them…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "v1" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: uno_platform_usage_rules_init, uno_platform_agent_rules_init · Private data: uno_platform_agent_rules_init · Public sink: uno_platform_agent_rules_init · Destructive: uno_platform_docs_fetch, uno_platform_usage_rules_init, uno_platform_agent_rules_init.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: uno_platform_usage_rules_init, uno_platform_agent_rules_init · Private data: uno_platform_agent_rules_init · Public sink: uno_platform_agent_rules_init · Destructive: uno_platform_docs_fetch, uno_platform_usage_rules_init, uno_platform_agent_rules_init

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
